RURIMEGU-KAHO_DEFEND.title: Defend
RURIMEGU-KAHO_STRIKE.title: Strike
RURIMEGU-SPECIAL_THANKS.title: Special Thanks
RURIMEGU-A_THOUSAND_CHANGES.title: A Thousand Changes
RURIMEGU-A_THOUSAND_CHANGES.description: This turn, your ❤️ overflow is converted to an equal amount of Max ❤️.
RURIMEGU-SUMMERY_PAIN.title: Summery Pain
RURIMEGU-SUMMERY_PAIN.description: Discard your hand and draw that many cards. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: Whenever you have fewer than {RURIMEGU-HAND_THRESHOLD} cards in hand, draw 1 card.
RURIMEGU-PRESENT_PAST_FUTURE.title: Present, Past, Future
RURIMEGU-PRESENT_PAST_FUTURE.description: Discard your hand and draw that many cards. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: Trigger this card's effect for every {RURIMEGU-PPF_THRESHOLD}❤️ Collected. (Current: {RURIMEGU-PPF_TRACKER})
RURIMEGU-IS_THAT_CLOUD_A_WHALE.title: Is That Cloud A Whale?
RURIMEGU-IS_THAT_CLOUD_A_WHALE.descripti: Gain 1 [gold]Intangible[/gold] for every {RURIMEGU-MAX_HEARTS_THRESHOLD} Max ❤️ you have. Reset Max ❤️ to 9.
RURIMEGU-EXCESSIVE_TRAINING.title: Excessive Training
RURIMEGU-EXCESSIVE_TRAINING.description: Reduce your Max ❤️ by {RURIMEGU-MAX_HEARTS_THRESHOLD} up to {RURIMEGU-MAX_TIMES} times. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} for each reduction.
RURIMEGU-ENDURING_TRADITION.title: Enduring Tradition
RURIMEGU-ENDURING_TRADITION.description: Until the end of turn, whenever your Max ❤️ increases, trigger [gold]Auto Burst[/gold] that many times and [gold]Collect[/gold] instead.
RURIMEGU-TWO_SECONDS_OF_ETERNITY.title: Two Seconds Of Eternity
RURIMEGU-TWO_SECONDS_OF_ETERNITY.descrip: Play all other cards in your hand. This card's cost equals their total cost.
RURIMEGU-BALL_OF_TRAILS.title: Ball of Trails
RURIMEGU-BALL_OF_TRAILS.description: [gold]Burst[/gold] {RURIMEGU-BURST:diff()}. If drawn at the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and discard your hand, then draw that many cards.
RURIMEGU-SPECIAL_THANKS.description: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you play an Attack, [gold]Burst[/gold] {RURIMEGU-BURST:diff()}.
RURIMEGU-BUDDING_PREMONITION.title: Budding Premonition
RURIMEGU-BUDDING_PREMONITION.description: Increase max ❤️ by {RURIMEGU-EXPAND_HEARTS:diff()}. Deal damage equal to your current max ❤️.
RURIMEGU-FINAL_ACT.title: Final Act
RURIMEGU-FINAL_ACT.description: Deal damage equal to your current ❤️. Collect.
RURIMEGU-TRAINING_OUTCOMES.title: Training Outcomes
RURIMEGU-TRAINING_OUTCOMES.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you [gold]Collect[/gold], this card costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less in this combat.
RURIMEGU-KAHO_SMASH.title: Kaho Smash
RURIMEGU-FANTASY375.title: 37.5°C's Fantasy
RURIMEGU-FANTASY375.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Your next Skill card costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less this turn.
RURIMEGU-STEP_UP.title: Step Up!
RURIMEGU-BUNNY_PYON_PYON.title: Bunny Pyon Pyon
RURIMEGU-BUNNY_PYON_PYON.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. [gold]Burst[/gold] equal to the damage dealt.
RURIMEGU-CERISE_BOUQUET.title: Cerise Bouquet
RURIMEGU-CERISE_BOUQUET.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies 3 times.
RURIMEGU-SPRING_BREEZE_SWING.title: Spring Breeze Swing
RURIMEGU-SPRING_BREEZE_SWING.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever [gold]Burst[/gold] reaches your ❤️ limit, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
RURIMEGU-BUNNY_DEFEND.title: Bunny Defend
RURIMEGU-BUNNY_DEFEND.description: Gain Block equal to your current max ❤️.
RURIMEGU-GENYOU_YAKOU.title: Genyou Yakou
RURIMEGU-GENYOU_YAKOU.description: If you have 10 or more ❤️, draw {Cards:diff()} cards. [gold]Collect[/gold].
RURIMEGU-ZANYOU.title: Zanyou
RURIMEGU-NEW_BLACK.title: Nεw Black
RURIMEGU-NEW_BLACK.description: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: for every 6 [gold]Burst[/gold], gain {BACKSTAGE_BLOCK:diff()} Block. (Current: {NEW_BLACK_TRACKER})
RURIMEGU-CURTAIN_CALL.title: Curtain Call
RURIMEGU-FULL_OF_POWER.title: Full Of Power
RURIMEGU-AGILE_STEPS.title: Agile Steps
RURIMEGU-AGILE_STEPS.description: [gold]Burst[/gold] {RURIMEGU-BURST:diff()}. Your next Attack card costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less.
RURIMEGU-LOVE_IT.title: Love it!
RURIMEGU-MIX_SHAKE.title: Mix shake!!
RURIMEGU-MIX_SHAKE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Triggers once more for every 10 ❤️ you have.
RURIMEGU-FAN_SERVICE.title: Fan Service
RURIMEGU-FAN_SERVICE.description: [gold]Collect[/gold]. The damage from Collect also hits 1 additional random enemy.
RURIMEGU-GLOWING_ROUTINE.title: Glowing Routine
RURIMEGU-GLOWING_ROUTINE.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Burst[/gold] {RURIMEGU-BURST:diff()}.
RURIMEGU-UNFULFILLED_WISHES.title: Unfulfilled Wishes
RURIMEGU-UNFULFILLED_WISHES.description: Deal damage equal to the difference between your max ❤️ and current ❤️. Gain Block equal to your current ❤️.
RURIMEGU-VARIATIONS.title: Variations
RURIMEGU-VARIATIONS.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Draw {Cards:diff()} card. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever your max ❤️ changes, this card costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less next time it is played.
RURIMEGU-AFTERGLOW.title: Afterglow
RURIMEGU-AFTERGLOW.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Whenever you [gold]Collect[/gold], return this card from discard pile to your hand.
RURIMEGU-BUILD_UP.title: Build-up
RURIMEGU-BUILD_UP.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Draw {BUILD_UP_DRAW:diff()} card(s). [gold]Backstage[/gold]: for every 3 times you [gold]Burst[/gold], draw 1 extra card when you play this card. (Current: {BUILD_UP_TRACKER})
RURIMEGU-SUDDEN_INSPIRATION.title: Sudden Inspiration
RURIMEGU-FULL_BLOOM_SPRINT.title: Full Bloom Sprint
RURIMEGU-FULL_BLOOM_SPRINT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If your ❤️ is at max, [gold]Collect[/gold] and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
RURIMEGU-EPHEMERAL_YOUTH.title: Ephemeral Youth
RURIMEGU-EPHEMERAL_YOUTH.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you play a card, this card's damage is reduced by 4 this turn.
RURIMEGU-HEART_STRIKE.title: Heart Strike
RURIMEGU-HEART_STRIKE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Increase max ❤️ by damage dealt.
RURIMEGU-BACKSTAGE_PREPARATION.title: Backstage Preparation
RURIMEGU-BACKSTAGE_PREPARATION.descripti: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Your next [gold]Backstage[/gold] card costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less.
RURIMEGU-OVERFLOWING_EMOTION.title: Overflowing Emotion
RURIMEGU-OVERFLOWING_EMOTION.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you [gold]Collect[/gold], permanently gain +{OVERFLOWING_EMOTION_GROWTH:diff()} damage.
RURIMEGU-SRK.title: S.R.K.
RURIMEGU-SRK.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Increase max ❤️ by {RURIMEGU-EXPAND_HEARTS:diff()}. [gold]Burst[/gold] {RURIMEGU-BURST:diff()}. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
RURIMEGU-EMBRACING_PETALS.title: Embracing Petals
RURIMEGU-EMBRACING_PETALS.description: Deal damage equal to your [gold]Auto Burst[/gold] amount to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you [gold]Collect[/gold], gain {RURIMEGU-AUTO_BURST:diff()} [gold]Auto Burst[/gold].
RURIMEGU-SAYO_SHIGURE.title: Sayo-Shigure
RURIMEGU-SAYO_SHIGURE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you [gold]Burst[/gold] 10, [gold]Burst[/gold] {RURIMEGU-BURST:diff()}. (Current: {SAYO_SHIGURE_TRACKER})
RURIMEGU-MYSTERY_AT_THE_LIBRARY.title: Mystery at the Library
RURIMEGU-MYSTERY_AT_THE_LIBRARY.descript: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you play a Skill, [gold]Burst[/gold] {RURIMEGU-BURST:diff()}.
RURIMEGU-DREAM_BELIEVERS.title: Dream Believers
RURIMEGU-AURORA_FLOWER.title: Aurora Flower
RURIMEGU-ON_YOUR_MARK.title: On Your Mark
RURIMEGU-ON_YOUR_MARK.description: Increase max ❤️ by {RURIMEGU-EXPAND_HEARTS:diff()}X. When drawn, gain Block equal to 3x your current Energy.
RURIMEGU-SOULMATE.title: Soulmate
RURIMEGU-MENTAL_GUARD.title: Mental Guard
RURIMEGU-MENTAL_GUARD.description: This turn, [gold]Burst[/gold] grants Block instead of ❤️. Equal amount of Block.
RURIMEGU-HALF_CONVEYED_FEELINGS.title: Half-Conveyed Feelings
RURIMEGU-FALL_BACK_ASLEEP.title: Fall Back Asleep
RURIMEGU-FALL_BACK_ASLEEP.description: Gain Block equal to current ❤️. Block persists this turn.
RURIMEGU-ENCORE.title: Encore
RURIMEGU-ENCORE.description: Gain 1 Block for every [gold]Burst[/gold] triggered this turn. (Current: {ENCORE_TRACKER})
RURIMEGU-CELEBRATION.title: Celebration!
RURIMEGU-CELEBRATION.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: every {CELEBRATION_THRESHOLD:diff()} times you [gold]Burst[/gold], draw 1 card. (Current: {CELEBRATION_TRACKER})
RURIMEGU-TRUE_FACE_PIXEL.title: True Face Pixel
RURIMEGU-TRUE_FACE_PIXEL.description: This turn, your next [gold]Burst[/gold] card deals damage equal to [gold]Burst[/gold] count to ALL enemies.
RURIMEGU-FULL_BLOOM.title: Full Bloom!
RURIMEGU-FULL_BLOOM.description: If your ❤️ is at max, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
RURIMEGU-CHOREOGRAPHY_MEMO.title: Choreography Memo
RURIMEGU-LINK_TO_THE_FUTURE.title: Link to the FUTURE
RURIMEGU-SUKI_SUKI_CLUB.title: Suki Suki Club
RURIMEGU-SUKI_SUKI_CLUB.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. When drawn, increase max ❤️ by {RURIMEGU-EXPAND_HEARTS:diff()}.
RURIMEGU-SECTION_CHANGE.title: Section Change
RURIMEGU-SECTION_CHANGE.description: At the end of your turn, [gold]Collect[/gold].
RURIMEGU-SUGAR_MELT.title: Sugar Melt
RURIMEGU-SPECIAL_APPEAL.title: Special Appeal
RURIMEGU-SPECIAL_APPEAL.description: Whenever you [gold]Collect[/gold] ❤️, deal damage to ALL enemies.
RURIMEGU-UNADORNED_BEAUTY.title: Unadorned Beauty
RURIMEGU-UNADORNED_BEAUTY.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. You can no longer increase your ❤️ limit.
RURIMEGU-AUTO_COLLECT_ON.title: Auto Collect: On
RURIMEGU-HOLIDAY_HOLIDAY.title: Holiday∞Holiday
RURIMEGU-HOLIDAY_HOLIDAY.description: Whenever you trigger a [gold]Backstage[/gold] effect, it triggers one additional time.
RURIMEGU-WELCOME_ISHIKAWA.title: Welcome! Ishikawa
RURIMEGU-WELCOME_ISHIKAWA.description: At the start of your turn, choose at most {Cards:diff()} [gold]Backstage[/gold] card(s) from your draw pile to put into your hand.
RURIMEGU-TRAINING_CAMP.title: Training Camp
RURIMEGU-TRAINING_CAMP.description: The first {Repeat:diff()} [gold]Backstage[/gold] cards you play each turn cost {Energy:energyIcons()} less.
RURIMEGU-CAREER_SURVEY.title: Career Survey
RURIMEGU-CAREER_SURVEY.description: Whenever you [gold]Burst[/gold] at least {RURIMEGU-BURST:diff()} ❤️ in a single instance without reaching your limit, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
RURIMEGU-AUTO_CLICKER_ON.title: Auto Clicker: On
RURIMEGU-FLOWER_KNOT.title: Flower Knot
RURIMEGU-FLOWER_KNOT.description: Whenever you trigger a [gold]Backstage[/gold] effect, trigger [gold]Auto Burst[/gold] once.
RURIMEGU-REFLECTION_IN_THE_MIRROR.title: Reflection in the Mirror
RURIMEGU-REFLECTION_IN_THE_MIRROR.descri: Effects that increase your Max ❤️ trigger twice.
RURIMEGU-PROLOGUE.title: Prologue
RURIMEGU-PROLOGUE.description: The first time your Max ❤️ changes each turn, your next card costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less.
RURIMEGU-MAY_DREAMS_BLOOM.title: May Dreams Bloom
RURIMEGU-MAY_DREAMS_BLOOM.description: For every {RURIMEGU-MAX_HEARTS_THRESHOLD:diff()} ❤️ overflowed, gain 1 stack of [gold]Auto Burst[/gold].
RURIMEGU-BLOOM_GARDEN_PARTY.title: Bloom Garden Party
RURIMEGU-BLOOM_GARDEN_PARTY.description: Your [gold]Backstage[/gold] effects can also trigger from the discard pile.
